title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Country Delight - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Country Delight - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Country Delight in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Country Delight:
Country Delight is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Country Delight!
